infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ListingAI needs access to your camera so you can take photos of a property on-site to include when generating listing descriptions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ListingAI needs access to your microphone so you can dictate property details by voice instead of typing them manually.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ListingAI needs access to your photo library so you can select property photos to include when generating listing descriptions.

plugins.photosPermission: ListingAI needs access to your photo library so you can select property photos to include when generating listing descriptions.
plugins.cameraPermission: ListingAI needs access to your camera so you can take photos of a property on-site to include when generating listing descriptions.

plugins.microphonePermission: ListingAI needs access to your microphone so you can dictate property details by voice instead of typing them manually.
